title: Add GigScale to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [GigScale](https://gigscale.app) to business
- Audit Upwork and Fiverr profiles for SEO gaps, conversion roadblocks, and readability issues, and generate a Profile Strength Index with GigScale.

Fixes #10043

gist.headline: Freelance glow-up
gist.blurb: GigScale has joined the Pollinations ecosystem! This clever new app audits your Upwork and Fiverr profiles to help you land more freelance gigs.
gist.summary: Added GigScale to the community apps showcase, a tool that audits Upwork and Fiverr profiles for SEO gaps and generates a Profile Strength Index.
gist.impact: Freelancers can now discover and use GigScale to optimize their gig economy profiles and improve their conversion rates.
gist.visual_concept: The scene should represent freelancing, auditing, and profiles. A cozy pixel art office or desk setup. The bee mascot (Polly) wearing a tiny business tie or holding a clipboard, reviewing a pixelated resume or profile. The Monitor Robot is there showing a 'Profile Strength' chart (a little bar graph going up).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny business tie, holding a clipboard and reviewing a pixelated resume. Next to her, a chunky retro monitor robot displays a rising bar graph on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
